rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal — Iran deal uncertainty continues to have indirect energy price relevance, but no new developments.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal still uncertain; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: Unresolved Middle East situation keeps indirect energy price pressure on Portugal's economy and households. No qualitative change from last cycle.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on capping population has minor indirect relevance to EU migration policy debate, but no direct impact on Portuguese life.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: Large US media merger with negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life or economy.
